title: Predicted false SPEAK: 'owner' matches inside 'co-owner' on a third-party reference
predicted_basis: _classify_text SPEAK branch matches 'owner' inside 'co-owner' per TUR-12 corpus comment (spec FR-004 predicted trap family)
failure_mode: substring trap: 'owner' matches inside 'co-owner'; SPEAK branch fires on a third-party ownership reference that assigns nothing to the receiving agent (FR-004)
invariant: verdict keywords must not match across word boundaries
rationale: The trigger names a different participant as co-owner and the context corroborates that the co-owner is already handling it, so the receiving agent (vigil) should stay out (PASS) or at most acknowledge receipt (ACK). A shallow keyword/substring classifier baits on 'owner' and treats the third-party reference as an assignment to itself, producing SPEAK.
